allow: PowerShell($f = '.github\\workflows\\contract-freeze-check.yml'; $raw = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($f\); "Length=$\($raw.Length\)"; "First 4 bytes: $\($raw[0..3] | ForEach-Object { '{0:X2}' -f $_ }\)"; "Has BOM FF FE \(UTF16-LE\): $\($raw[0] -eq 0xFF -and $raw[1] -eq 0xFE\)"; "Has BOM FE FF \(UTF16-BE\): $\($raw[0] -eq 0xFE -and $raw[1] -eq 0xFF\)")
PowerShell("=== MODIFIED \(50\) ==="; Get-Content logs\\hygiene\\modified_files.txt; "`n=== UNTRACKED \(115\) ==="; Get-Content logs\\hygiene\\untracked_files.txt)

PowerShell("=== sample diff: feature/push-intercept/build.gradle.kts ==="; git diff -- feature/push-intercept/build.gradle.kts | Select-Object -First 60; "`n=== sample diff: feature/push-intercept/proguard-rules.pro ==="; git diff -- feature/push-intercept/proguard-rules.pro | Select-Object -First 30)
PowerShell("=== libs.versions.toml diff ==="; git diff -- gradle/libs.versions.toml | Select-Object -First 80)

PowerShell("=== core/model/build.gradle.kts diff ==="; git diff -- core/model/build.gradle.kts | Select-Object -First 40; "`n=== core/model/.../ConclusionCategory.kt diff \(first 15 lines\) ==="; git diff -- core/model/src/main/kotlin/app/myphonecheck/mobile/core/model/ConclusionCategory.kt | Select-Object -First 15; "`n=== app/build.gradle.kts diff ==="; git diff -- app/build.gradle.kts | Select-Object -First 50)

PowerShell($content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText\('.github\\workflows\\contract-freeze-check.yml', [System.Text.Encoding]::Unicode\); "Text length: $\($content.Length\) chars"; "Normalizing line endings \(CRLF -> LF\)"; $normalized = $content -replace "`r`n", "`n"; "Writing as UTF-8 \(no BOM\)"; $utf8NoBom = New-Object System.Text.UTF8Encoding $false; [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText\('.github\\workflows\\contract-freeze-check.yml', $normalized, $utf8NoBom\); "Re-read verification:"; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\('.github\\workflows\\contract-freeze-check.yml'\); "New length: $\($bytes.Length\)"; "First 4 bytes \(hex\): $\($bytes[0..3] | ForEach-Object { $_.ToString\('X2'\) }\)"; "First char UTF-8 decode:"; [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetString\($bytes[0..40]\))
PowerShell("=== Modified files NOT staged ==="; git diff --name-only 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch 'warning:' }; "`n=== Untracked files ==="; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard)

PowerShell("=== git stash show \(what's in stash\) ==="; git stash show --stat 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 20; "---"; "=== What stash actually saved: ==="; git stash show -- --stat stash@{0} 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell("Quick sanity check: is app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml really still modified?"; \(git diff --name-only\) -contains 'app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml'; "---"; "Recent HEAD pointer hasn't moved?"; git rev-parse HEAD; "---"; "reflog last 3:"; git reflog -3)

PowerShell("Current stash list before dropping:"; git stash list; "---"; "Dropping stash@{0} \(mixed content, redundant with working tree\):"; git stash drop stash@{0} 2>&1; "---"; "After drop:"; git stash list)

PowerShell(git diff --name-only 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch 'warning:' -and $_ -notmatch 'replaced' -and $_.Length -gt 0 }; "---"; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_.Length -gt 0 })

PowerShell("=== core/common presence in staged ==="; git diff --cached --name-only -- 'core/common/' | Sort-Object; "---"; "Files expected: 14 \(1 FREEZE.md + 1 build.gradle.kts + 8 main kt + 4 test kt\)"; "Actually staged: $\(\(git diff --cached --name-only -- 'core/common/' | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines\)")

PowerShell("=== 현재 로컬 상태 ==="; "HEAD: $\(git rev-parse HEAD\)"; "HEAD^: $\(git rev-parse HEAD~1\)"; git log --oneline origin/codex-global-single-core-snapshot..HEAD; "---"; "=== 원격 상태 ==="; git log --oneline -3 origin/codex-global-single-core-snapshot; "---"; "=== working tree cleanliness ==="; "staged: $\(\(git diff --cached --name-only | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines\)  modified: $\(\(git diff --name-only 2>&1 | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch 'warning:' -and $_ -notmatch 'replaced' -and $_.Length -gt 0 } | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines\)  untracked: $\(\(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines\)"; "---"; "=== stash list ==="; git stash list)
PowerShell("=== robocopy error output ==="; Get-Content logs\\filter\\robocopy.txt -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 30)

PowerShell("=== stash contents \(is stage1_research in here?\) ==="; git stash list; "---"; git stash show 'stash@{0}' --stat 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'stage1_research'; "---"; "=== stash full file list ==="; git stash show 'stash@{0}' --name-only 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'stage1_research|docs/01')
